commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a client-side socket error handler for debug proxy CONNECT tunnels and changes upstream-error cleanup from ending to destroying the client socket.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main has no clientSocket error listener in the CONNECT tunnel, and Node's EventEmitter/net.Socket contract makes an unhandled socket error a process-ending path. I did not run a live current-main crash repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair lane is needed because the proposed code is already narrow; maintainer handling should request or verify real behavior proof before merge.
